reasoning: Paul Biedermann's 200m freestyle world record of 1:42.00 was set in 2009 during the supersuit era and has stood for 15+ years. The closest anyone has come recently is David Popovici (1:42.97 in 2022) and maybe Michael Phelps back in 2008. Given the lack of major long course championships between October 2025 and January 2026 (the main swimming season for long course is typically in the summer, with the World Championships usually in July or August), it is highly unlikely the record will be broken before the close date of January 2026. Therefore, the probability that Biedermann will still hold the record is very high.
